rollingHandoffIn:
Speaker registry (reuse speaker_id only for the same acoustic voice):
- spk_001 => Speaker 1 | acoustic cues: calm, authoritative, slightly ominous tone | inferred traits: age_range: adult | recent lines: Fear makes you easier to control. / It's time to wake up.
- spk_002 => Speaker 2 | acoustic cues: menacing, dramatic, deep voice | inferred traits: accent: possibly Hispanic | recent lines: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood. / Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.

Recent dialogue tail:
- Speaker 1 (spk_001): Fear makes you easier to control.
- Speaker 1 (spk_001): It's time to wake up.
- Speaker 2 (spk_002): Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
- Speaker 2 (spk_002): Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
